name: M3M Altitude
address: Golf Course Road Extn., Sector 65, Gurugram
description: Designed by the award-winning UHA London, M3M Altitude is a stunning masterpiece inspired by nature’s elegance. Soaring high, this architectural marvel offers a breathtaking sky experience. The unique Air Lounge features a first-of-its-kind glass Air Bridge, delivering panoramic views. Impeccably curated residences, with two master bedrooms and wrap-around decks, offer the perfect blend of luxury and comfort. Nestled within the prestigious M3M Golfestate, M3M Altitude stands proudly in Sector 65, Gurugram’s most affluent enclave.

name: M3M Mansion
address: Sector 113, SCDA, Dwarka Expressway, Delhi NCR
description: M3M Mansion is truly a remarkable addition to the master development, SCDA, encapsulating a luxurious golf-themed lifestyle with meandering water bodies, exquisite landscape and an uber luxury club life. Each residence is meticulously designed to provide a blend of modern architecture with spacious interiors ensuring  that elegance and comfort are at the forefront of M3M Mansion.

name: M3M The Cullinan
description: M3M The Cullinan, an emblem of grace and grandeur that touches the skies in Sector 94, Noida. Expansive 3, 4, and 5 BHK residences come with floor-to-ceiling windows offering panoramic views of the city skyline and golf course. Each residence is meticulously crafted with extended balconies, spacious rooms, and modern amenities that define elegance. The Cullinan’s design captures the spirit of exclusivity, featuring a lavish clubhouse, infinity pool, landscaped gardens, and state-of-the-art interiors. Live the pinnacle of sophistication, where every moment celebrates style and comfort.

name: M3M Crown
address: Sector 111, SCDA, Dwarka Expressway, Delhi NCR
description:
M3M Crown features a breath-taking Waterfront Club, masterfully crafted as part of SCDA's iconic architectural vision. Sophisticated and grand, its unique design sets a benchmark, seamlessly blending leafy curvatures with the serene surroundings, creating a gentle flow toward terraced gardens and a charming café.   

Whether it’s a moment of quiet reflection by the tranquil lake or indulging in a delightful culinary journey, the club promises experiences that captivate every sense.   

With thoughtfully curated spaces and amenities both inside and out, every day here feels like an escape to a luxurious resort—a true haven of immersive elegance.

name: M3M Golf Hills
description: M3M Golf Hills is a true trendsetter of golf inspired living and offers a holistic living experience for a lifestyle that is a class apart. With an array of amenities and facilities overlooking the Aravalli’s, M3M Golf Hills offer life that is truly global and world class besides being an address of stature. With a neighbourhood connected to all major hotspots, you are always close to all that you need in the vicinity.

name: M3M City of Dreams
description: The landscape of Panipat is not just about its tangible size; it’s also about the immeasurable capacity it holds. Thriving through the ages, M3M embodies prosperity, where boundaries to success are mere illusions. With modern engineering, remarkable architecture, advanced technology, and top-notch hospitality services, M3M sets a new standard for excellence.

name: M3M Capital
address: Sector 113, SCDA, Dwarka Expressway, Delhi NCR
description: Imagine a life of unparalleled luxury and convenience. At M3M Capital, you'll find it all-serene green spaces, meticulously designed interiors, and a prime location. It's more than a home; it's a lifestyle upgrade.
amenities: Private Events Area with a Dining Bar

name: M3M Antalya Hills
description: M3M Antalya Hills is nestled in the mystical Aravalli Hills, evolving into a nature-infused futuristic habitat. Thoughtfully designed to provide the best luxury living experience, the township demonstrates the prudent use of cutting-edge technology and multi-utility design. With the highest standards of aesthetics, work-life balance, fun, and enduring comfort, you can now enjoy the best of city access and an unbelievable natural living habitat, away from the hustle, bustle, and maddening monotony of city life.

name: M3M Soulitude
description:
M3M Soulitude, a rare luxury of Low-rise living, in Sector 89, Gurugram. Spread over 30 lush acres, it offers exclusive 2 & 3 BHK boutique floors with customizable basements, private terraces, and smartly designed layouts. 
Enjoy a tranquil lifestyle with top-notch connectivity and modern conveniences at your doorstep. We bring you a vibrant community that offers a complete lifestyle to keep up your spirits and experience soulful living.

name: M3M Fairway West
description:
M3M Golfestate Fairway West is a pinnacle of luxury within the iconic Golf Estate. Its majestic towers elegantly surround a signature 9-hole executive golf course, forming a stunning architectural marvel.  
Encased in a serene golf landscape with fountains, water features, and lush greenery, Fairway West offers scenic beauty and refined living. The residences cocoon you in unmatched elegance and comfort, setting a new benchmark for luxury living.

name: M3M Fairway East
description: M3M Fairway East is an eclogue of luxury which is a part of Golf Estate. A mystical paradise situated at Golf Course Road (Extn.), Gurugram. Wrapped in sophistication, it proffers a statement of doting exclusivity. A haven where modern amenities meet unparalleled quality with uncommon architectural details like the luxury of space and linear design.

name: M3M Panorama Suites
description:
Awaken to stunning views, where lush greenery and a sprawling golf course embrace your every glance. Comprising just 36 meticulously designed suites within the prestigious M3M Golfestate, these living spaces embody the pinnacle of luxury. Smartly crafted for modern living, each suite ensures that every convenience and indulgence is at your fingertips. 
Set within an oasis of tranquility, M3M Panorama offers an exclusive residential resort experience like no other.

name: M3M Polo Suites
description:
M3M Polo Suites, nestled within the 56+ acres of M3M Golfestate, step into the heart of Gurugram’s regal essence—a majestic Capitol where grandeur reigns.
The suites offer a living experience where art and aristocracy converge. The residences are designed as fortresses of opulence, each detail a tribute to an elite legacy. Curated with polo-inspired motifs and crafted by an international team of experts, these lavish homes exude unmatched sophistication. 3, 4 & 5 BHK Luxury Apartments.

name: M3M St. Andrews
description:
M3M St. Andrews is the crown jewel of M3M Golfestate, set amidst 56+ acres of world-class golf-themed residences. Inspired by the iconic St. Andrews course in Scotland, it embodies the pinnacle of ultra-premium living, crafted for the elite.
These exclusive residences boast expansive spaces and impeccable attention to detail, offering a private sanctuary away from the crowd. At M3M St. Andrews, luxury living meets tranquility, designed for those who seek only the finest.

name: M3M SkySuites
description:
M3M SkySuites represents the epitome of elite living, offering an unrivaled lifestyle of opulence, unmatched leisure, and complete privacy. Nestled within the iconic M3M Golfestate on Golf Course Road Extn. it is a sanctuary of sophistication and exclusivity.
With residences spanning from 9,000 sq. ft. to 15,000 sq. ft., each suite is thoughtfully designed to offer expansive, open spaces, allowing residents to experience life in its fullest grandeur. A true retreat for those accustomed to the very best, M3M SkySuites promises a luxury living experience.

name: M3M Latitude
description: M3M Latitude redefines luxury living with an iconic singular tower which is part of Golf Estate that commands breathtaking views of Gurugram’s modern skyline. An architectural masterpiece, it is a harmonious blend of exceptional design, world-class amenities, and unparalleled privacy. Designed for the connoisseurs of contemporary luxury, M3M Latitude offers a lifestyle that’s nothing short of extraordinary.

name: M3M Merlin
address: Golf Course Road Extn., Sector 67, Gurugram
description: M3M Merlin offers a magical experience of Singapore-style world-class apartments in the heart of Gurugram. This luxurious residential development features spacious 3 and 4 BHK apartments, along with exclusive penthouses, all designed to provide a harmonious blend of comfort and elegance. With meticulously planned layouts and top-notch amenities, M3M Merlin caters to the aspirations of modern urban dwellers seeking an upscale lifestyle.

name: M3M Woodshire
description: M3M Woodshire is a premium residential development designed to offer a serene and tranquil environment amidst the bustling cityscape. Located in Sector 107, Gurugram, this project provides a harmonious blend of modern amenities and natural surroundings, ensuring a lifestyle that enriches the soul.

name: M3M Escala
description: M3M Escala is a boutique residential development offering exclusive 2 and 3 BHK apartments designed to provide a harmonious blend of comfort and elegance. Nestled in Sector 70A, Gurugram, this project offers residents a serene living environment with modern amenities and expansive green spaces.

name: M3M Heights
address: Golf Course Road Extn., Sector 65, Gurugram
description: Welcome to M3M Heights, where luxury meets convenience in the heart of Gurugram. Nestled within the vibrant mixed-use marvel of M3M 65th Avenue, this iconic residential development offers ultra-modern 2 and 3 BHK apartments designed for contemporary living. Located on Golf Course Road Extn., it boasts a prestigious neighbourhood surrounded by upscale developments. With international standard amenities and leisure options just steps away, M3M Heights redefines holistic living — bringing wellness, recreation, and urban convenience right at your doorstep. Live a life of endless possibilities and cherished moments.

name: M3M Skycity
address: Golf Course Road Extn., Sector 65, Gurugram
description: Welcome to M3M Skycity, where luxury meets convenience in the heart of Gurugram. Nestled within the vibrant mixed-use marvel of M3M 65th Avenue, this iconic residential development offers ultra-modern 2 and 3 BHK apartments designed for contemporary living. Located on Golf Course Road (Extn.), it boasts a prestigious neighbourhood surrounded by upscale developments. With international-standard amenities and leisure options just steps away, M3M Skycity redefines holistic living—bringing wellness, recreation, and urban convenience right to your doorstep. Live a life of endless possibilities and cherished moments.

name: M3M Marina
description: M3M Marina offers luxurious waterfront apartments designed for those who seek tranquility and elegance. These 2 and 3 BHK homes are crafted with meticulous attention to detail, blending modern architecture with resort-style amenities to create a serene and upscale living experience.

name: M3M Sierra68
description: M3M Sierra is a premium residential development offering modern 2 and 3 BHK apartments designed to provide a harmonious blend of comfort and elegance. Situated in Sector 68, Gurugram, this project offers residents a serene living environment with modern amenities and expansive green spaces.

name: M3M Ikonic
description: M3M Ikonic offers exclusive 3 BHK luxury apartments designed to provide a harmonious blend of comfort and elegance. This project offers residents a serene living environment with modern amenities and expansive green spaces.

name: M3M Natura
description: M3M Natura offers a serene living experience, seamlessly blending modern design with nature's tranquility. Situated in Gurugram's Sector 68, this residential haven provides residents with a harmonious environment, complemented by state-of-the-art amenities and lush green surroundings.

name: M3M Flora68
description: M3M Flora68 is a premium residential development offering 2 and 3 BHK apartments designed to create a perfect balance between modern living and natural serenity. With expansive green spaces and state-of-the-art amenities, it redefines comfort and elegance for its residents.

name: M3M Skywalk
description: M3M Skywalk offers contemporary 2 and 3 BHK residences designed for modern urban living. This project combines luxury with convenience, offering premium amenities and a seamless lifestyle experience for discerning homeowners.
